Download Standalone HTML
Bakes all current data Рђћ tasks, users, roles, categories, statuses, owners and members Рђћ directly into the HTML file. Copy that file to any machine, open it in a browser, and everything is right there. No server, no database needed.
Backup / Restore (.bak file)
­ЪЊЂ
Default .bak Save Location
Set the default directory where backup (.bak) files will be saved. Leave blank to use the browser's default download folder.
Auto-Backup Reminder
Remind admin to create a backup after a set number of days without one.
Backup & Restore
Create a .bak snapshot of all current data or restore from a previously saved backup file.
